fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ $('Parse Shopify Email').first().json.inquiryType === 'veteran' ? 'VA Funding & Handcycle Info' : 'Thanks for Reaching Out!' }}

parameters.subject: Freedom Ryder Handcycles - VA Funding & Handcycle Info
parameters.message:
={{ 'Hi ' + $('Parse Shopify Email').first().json.firstName + ',

This is Mike from Freedom Ryder Handcycles. Thanks for requesting more info on our handcycles + possible VA funding options!

First, here's a short video of one of our early riders so you can see what these handcycles can do: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hcmka1TgSVM&t=140s

Quick question: what's the easiest way to follow up with you—email, text, or a quick call?

Thanks,

Mike
503-692-1029' }}
